titleStmt.title: SII 27.403: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 403. (A.R. No. 52 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the second prākāra of the Raṅganāthaswamy temple.
It record the name of several female individuals who all probably pilgrims, belonged to the royal retinue.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumalaṁma . veṁgaḷaṁma . haḍupada veṁgaḷaṁma . pātrada lakumāji Āṁma haḍavada padmāvati . haḍapada rukumaṇi . bukkarājatimmarājagaḷamagaḷu tirumalaṁma . naṁdyāla dēva raṁmana tirumalaṁma . pāṁḍyarāja ra kṛṣṇaṁma
hegaḍite kikkāi
hāḍuva koṁḍaṁma
haḍapada koṁḍa
ma kōṭeya
lakṣumaṁma
kaṭṭanalli yida teṁgina mara jatu Ādahanamalla gaddeya kaṁdada bā
mūḍalu yidda teṁgina maradēvara sutaṁṇa sasimara Elau sahadēvara
gade vivara dayiṣidayake dinacariya kāyi 1 ṟa lekadali naḍasūdu dēva
gadeya makkiya hāḷiya bitti dēvaḷigeya habbakke Avau �ne 20
kā yi 12 paṁ paṁcaparvake kalattaṁṇataḷu tuṁbi dīvaḷigege parva 1 kke Eṁṇe hāne 3 ra le
kadalu ta 1 kaṁ hāne 15 yi Eṁṇeyanu kāyanu naḍasuva kasutaṇaggila nu marapa
ha saṁkharakādukāre nārāyaṇakudukāra Āṁṇataṁma Eradēva kalige nāyaru mula
vakōṭu barasida dēvasva saṁkharasēnabage maneyakaṭuvake guḷiyagadeya koṭṭakke keṟeya
teṁka kaṭṭiyiṁda teṁkanelana manekaḷake guḷiya gaddeya bittuvare mēlemalla gaddeyanīra
kaḍidu bittuvakaṭṭaḷe matte Aḍigaḷemane kudukārakaḷu Ibara mane 2 sēnabana manesaha dēvasva
hakalu 4 brahmasvakkebiṭṭa bāḷina vivara maṭada Elaṇamalagade mēlaṇa makiya hāḷi
gaḷu saha mēlaṇamallagadeya baḍaga Ā biṁda keḷage bittabede 3 mūḍila hakau
completly worn out
Aḍakeyagadde bittuva bede gaḻagadeya
ttu bayalalli medalagade Ādaṟa mūḍamakkina
damaged completly
bayalagade bittuvabede 30 hāne
Ā gadeyaṁ catrake baha Akki mu 3 dēvasvada taḷabittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugada
lu mū 12 hā 10 yi bāḷiṁ hattakke hāneyali baha Orave Akkimu 48
bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 20 hā 30 yitaḷa
ke hatteke hadināṟa hāneyali baha Orave Akkimuḍe 39 yi Akki baha dēvasva brahmasya
saha teṟu hoṟatāgi nāgaṁḍugadalu Akki ma 108 kke saha guḷiyagadeya nīraka
ḍidu bituva haḷiadaṟa mēlaṇa haḷisaha bituva hā 300 Ātaḷake Akimu 2 Akṣaradalu sa
ha Eraḍu mūḍe Aki kereya gadeya nīru kalagadege muṁḍagana gadege baha kaṭaḷeya
śāsana pramāṇa barasi dēvasva brahmasvada Akiya keyanu Okalanu yirisida
pasarvva ke nāgaṁḍugadalu 10 mūḍe Akkiyanu saṁkhara sēnabana saṁga
na pāraṁpariyāgi dēvara pāḍi huṭu Eṁdu jatu Adahanu Ātana kuṭuṁbadavara
keṁjāru cerppaḷiya Eraḍūru Opi barasida śāsanakke toḷaharu beṁmaṁṇaṁca
bāḷige Opa keṁjauru jeppaḷiya Eraḍūra O
pa nāyakana Opa jatu Ādahana Ova Ātanakuṭuṁbada koṟabhaṁḍāriya Opa sa
ṁkara ḍaraḷaya Opa Anaṁtana Opa hiriya beṭṭina brahmaru śrī kriṣṇa dēvaresaraṇu
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdhara śaṣṭarvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁjāyatēkri
mi
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
